Projects

Paint Program - Worked in a group of 4 to create a paint program using Java. Project was managed using AGILE Scrum method. Please contact me if you are interested in viewing the project as it is a school assignment.
Discord Chat Bot - Discord bot created in Java using the JDA Discord API wrapper. Allows users to interact with the bot using commands.
Twitch Chat Bot - Twitch chat bot created in JavaScript and Node.js. Monitors chat through an IRC interface, and interacts with the chat depending on messages sent by users.
Designed with by UTM Hacklab
